3248130.name: Quacking The Case Demo
3248130.description: In this unique string-pulling logic game, your entire case unfolds within Gregory’s cozy office. Examine a classic detective board full of clues, photos, and connections, dragging strings between them to reveal patterns, motives, and suspects. With each twist, more characters visit Gregory, adding to the mystery and perhaps even leading him astray.
3248130.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
